name: Molasses Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
In a medium bowl, add milk and egg whites. Mix well.
Add the cooked brown rice, raisins, molasses, salt, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well.
Pour into a medium baking dish.
Cover and bake for 1 hour or until the mixture is firm.
Serve warm or chilled, topped with whipped cream if desired.
